title: Cyber-Thief Showdown
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's accounts are hacked, so he dives into a virtual pirate game to catch the sneaky cyber-thief Nick Nobody! 💻

q.en: Why was everyone in New Mouse City suddenly rude to Geronimo?
q.zh: 为什么老鼠岛新城的居民突然都对杰罗尼摩不客气了？

options.en: Fake, edited photos in the newspapers made him look rude
options.zh: 报纸上经过篡改的假照片让他看起来很无礼

options.en: He forgot everyone's birthday according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他忘了所有人的生日（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He moved to another city
options.zh: 他搬去了别的城市

options.en: He won a big contest
options.zh: 他赢了一场大赛

explain.en: Hacked and edited photos showed Geronimo stepping on the mayor's paw and tripping others, so rodents turned against him.
explain.zh: 被盗并篡改过的照片显示杰罗尼摩踩市长的脚、绊倒别人，于是大家都不理他了。

q.en: What mistake on his computer let the hacker break in?
q.zh: 他电脑上什么疏失让黑客钻了空子？

options.en: He left it out in the rain
options.zh: 他把电脑放在雨里淋湿了

options.en: It was too old to work
options.zh: 电脑太旧用不了了

options.en: He had no password on his computer or email
options.zh: 他的电脑和邮箱都没有设密码

options.en: He shared it with a stranger according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他把电脑借给了一个陌生人（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Doc discovered Geronimo had created no password, so the hacker easily accessed his laptop, email, and credit card.
explain.zh: 博士发现杰罗尼摩根本没设密码，于是黑客轻松进入他的笔记本、邮箱和信用卡。

q.en: Who is Professor Margo Bitmouse, also called 'Doc'?
q.zh: 玛戈·比特鼠教授，也就是“博士”，是谁？

options.en: Geronimo's tailor
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的裁缝

options.en: A computer scientist who teaches Internet safety
options.zh: 一位教网络安全的计算机科学家

options.en: A pirate captain
options.zh: 一位海盗船长

options.en: The mayor of New Mouse City according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 老鼠岛新城的市长（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Doc is a computer scientist and the foremost Internet-safety expert on Mouse Island who taught Geronimo a safety class.
explain.zh: 博士是一位计算机科学家，也是老鼠岛首屈一指的网络安全专家，曾给杰罗尼摩上过安全课。

q.en: What do Doc's Ten Golden Rules teach?
q.zh: 博士的“十大黄金法则”教的是什么？

options.en: How to write a newspaper
options.zh: 如何办一份报纸

options.en: How to sail a ship
options.zh: 如何驾驶轮船

options.en: How to bake a chocolate cake according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 如何烤巧克力蛋糕（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: How to stay safe on the Internet
options.zh: 如何在网络上保护自己安全

explain.en: The Ten Golden Rules cover Internet safety, like using strong passwords and never clicking suspicious links.
explain.zh: 十大黄金法则讲的是网络安全，比如使用强密码、绝不点击可疑链接等。

q.en: Who is the notorious hacker behind the attack?
q.zh: 这场袭击背后那个臭名昭著的黑客是谁？

options.en: The bank manager
options.zh: 银行经理

options.en: Nick Nobody, the most notorious hacker on Mouse Island
options.zh: 影子侠尼克，老鼠岛最臭名昭著的黑客

options.en: A pirate cat
options.zh: 一只海盗猫

options.en: Geronimo's grandfather according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的爷爷（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Doc identified the hacker as Nick Nobody, the most notorious hacker on Mouse Island, who loves virtual-reality games.
explain.zh: 博士指认黑客是影子侠尼克——老鼠岛最臭名昭著的黑客，他酷爱虚拟现实游戏。

q.en: What online game did Geronimo use to challenge Nick Nobody?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩用哪款在线游戏向尼克发起挑战？

options.en: Spring Festival Egg Hunt according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 春节彩蛋大搜寻（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Mouse Island Race
options.zh: 老鼠岛大赛跑

options.en: Pirates of the Squeaky Seas
options.zh: 吱吱海域大海盗

options.en: Cheese Chef Challenge
options.zh: 奶酪大厨挑战赛

explain.en: Doc had Geronimo challenge Nick Nobody at Pirates of the Squeaky Seas, his favorite virtual-reality game.
explain.zh: 博士让杰罗尼摩在尼克最爱的虚拟现实游戏“吱吱海域大海盗”里向他下战书。

q.en: What names did the three Stiltons use in the game?
q.zh: 斯蒂顿一家三口在游戏里用了什么名字？

options.en: Gerry Shivertail, Terry the Terrible, and Benny the Buccaneer
options.zh: 发抖尾巴杰瑞、可怕的泰瑞和海盗本尼

options.en: Red Riding Hood, the Wolf, and the Hunter
options.zh: 小红帽、大灰狼和猎人

options.en: Captain Hook, Peter Pan, and Tinker Bell according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 胡克船长、彼得潘和叮当铃（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Tom, Jerry, and Spike
options.zh: 汤姆、杰瑞和斯派克

explain.en: Geronimo was Gerry Shivertail, Thea was Terry the Terrible, and Benjamin was Benny the Buccaneer.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩叫发抖尾巴杰瑞，蒂娅叫可怕的泰瑞，本杰明叫海盗本尼。

q.en: How did the team find Nick Nobody's secret hideout?
q.zh: 大家是如何找到尼克秘密老巢的？

options.en: They followed a treasure map in a book according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他们照着书里的藏宝图找（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Doc traced his signal to a red X on a map, then they swam through an underwater tunnel
options.zh: 博士把他的信号定位到地图上的红叉，然后他们游过一条水下隧道

options.en: They flew a purple helicopter
options.zh: 他们开了一架紫色直升机

options.en: They asked the mayor
options.zh: 他们去问了市长

explain.en: Doc tracked Nick's Internet location to an uncharted island; they swam through an underwater tunnel like in the game.
explain.zh: 博士把尼克的联网位置锁定在一座无名小岛，他们便像游戏里那样游过水下隧道。

q.en: What was Nick Nobody really, once captured?
q.zh: 被抓住后，尼克·诺巴迪到底是什么人？

options.en: A young mouselet wearing a pirate costume and wig
options.zh: 一只穿着海盗装、戴着假发的小老鼠

options.en: A talking parrot
options.zh: 一只会说话的鹦鹉

options.en: An old sea captain according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一位年老的船长（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A giant robot
options.zh: 一个巨型机器人

explain.en: When Thea swiveled his chair, Nick's hat slipped off and revealed he was just a young mouselet in costume and a wig.
explain.zh: 蒂娅转动他的椅子时，尼克的帽子掉了，露出他不过是一只穿着戏服、戴着假发的小老鼠。

q.en: Why did Nick Nobody feel sorry at the end?
q.zh: 最后尼克·诺巴迪为什么感到愧疚？

options.en: He lost the video game according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他输掉了电子游戏（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He wanted a new wig
options.zh: 他想要一顶新假发

options.en: He was seasick
options.zh: 他晕船了

options.en: He used to love reading pirate books and felt bad kids might lose Geronimo's books
options.zh: 他以前爱读海盗冒险书，觉得孩子们可能因此读不到杰罗尼摩的书而难过

explain.en: Nick said he used to love adventure and pirate books, stopped reading, and cried that other mouselets might lose Geronimo's books.
explain.zh: 尼克说自己以前爱读冒险和海盗书，后来不再读书，想到别的小老鼠可能读不到杰罗尼摩的书而哭了。
